rf.title: RF Receiver Frequencies
rf.subtitle: Special detector designed for finding stashes.
rf.quickStartDesc: Copy the frequency and enter it into the device
rf.quickStartInstruction: Click on the desired card on the right — the frequency will immediately go to the clipboard. After that, paste it into the RF receiver in the game.
rf.guide.title: Step-by-step guide
rf.guide.subtitle: How to use the RF receiver
rf.guide.desc: Short guide: from installing the device to receiving the box with reward.
rf.guide.step1.title: Equip the receiver
rf.guide.step1.desc: Place the device in the detector slot and take it in your hands.
rf.guide.step2.title: Enter the frequency
rf.guide.step2.desc: In inventory, right-click on the device, turn it on and enter the frequency of the desired location.
rf.guide.step3.title: Follow the signal
rf.guide.step3.desc: The green indicator should glow, not blink. Sound acceleration indicates the proximity of the stash.
rf.guide.step4.title: Collect the reward
rf.guide.step4.desc: At the end point, a box with loot will appear. Take it to a safe zone to open and collect the contents.
rf.npc.title: Where to get the receiver
rf.npc.name: NPC Mastak
rf.npc.desc: The RF receiver can be obtained from a technician named Mastak. He gives a short task, after accepting which you immediately receive the device.
updates.title: Patch Notes
updates.subtitle: Changelog and recent database edits
error.subtitle: The anomaly consumed the page
error.desc: The requested page does not exist or has been moved. It may have been consumed by an anomaly. Use the navigation below to return to a safe zone.
